summary: Inventory Operations Pack + UI Simplification testing completed - 24/24 backend tests passed (100%), All 5 frontend pages working correctly. All navigation links properly added to sidebar.

inventory_ops_dashboard.notes: Returns metrics: low_stock_items, pending_delivery_notes, pending_goods_receipts, open_purchase_orders, reserved_orders, movements_today, total_items, total_raw_materials, total_suppliers

inventory_ops_low_stock.notes: Returns list of low stock items with id, sku, name, type, on_hand, available, threshold

suppliers_crud.notes: Full CRUD operations working correctly with proper validation

purchase_orders_crud.notes: Full PO workflow working: create → approve → update status. PO numbers auto-generated as PO-YYYYMMDDHHMMSS

goods_receiving_crud.notes: GRN creation and status updates working. Receipt numbers auto-generated as GRN-YYYYMMDDHHMMSS

delivery_notes_crud.notes: DN creation and status updates working. Note numbers auto-generated as DN-YYYYMMDDHHMMSS. Supports order, invoice, or direct source types.

inventory_ledger.notes: Returns stock movement history with filtering by SKU, movement_type, direction, warehouse_id

inventory_operations_page.notes: Page loads with 5 metric cards (Low Stock, Delivery Notes, Goods Receipts, Open POs, Reserved Orders), 4 secondary metrics, 2 action panels (Dispatch & Fulfillment, Receiving & Procurement)

delivery_notes_page.notes: Page loads with Create Delivery Note button, form with source type, source ID, delivered by/to, line items JSON. Shows existing delivery notes with status badges.

goods_receiving_page.notes: Page loads with Receive Stock button, form with supplier select, warehouse, received by, items JSON. Shows existing receipts with status badges.

suppliers_page.notes: Page loads with Add Supplier button, comprehensive form (name, contact, email, phone, city, country, tax number, payment terms, lead time, address, bank details, notes). Shows supplier cards with edit/delete actions.

purchase_orders_page.notes: Page loads with Create Purchase Order button, form with supplier select, expected delivery date, warehouse, items JSON. Shows PO cards with Approve & Order, Cancel, Mark Partial/Full Receipt actions based on status.

sidebar_navigation.feature: Updated sidebar navigation with Inventory & Procurement section
sidebar_navigation.notes: 5 new navigation items added: Inventory Workspace, Delivery Notes, Goods Receiving, Suppliers, Purchase Orders. All with moduleKey='inventory' for role-based filtering.

critical_code_review_comments: inventory_movement_service.py: Clean centralized stock movement logging with proper direction (in/out) tracking
inventory_balance_service.py: Proper reserve/issue/receive logic with on_hand, reserved, available qty tracking
delivery_note_routes.py: Handles order/invoice/direct source types, issues stock via balance service, records movements
goods_receiving_routes.py: Receives stock via balance service, links to PO and supplier, records movements
supplier_routes.py: Clean CRUD with proper serialization excluding MongoDB _id
procurement_routes.py: Full PO lifecycle with draft → ordered → received status flow
inventory_operations_dashboard_routes.py: Aggregates metrics from multiple collections efficiently
Frontend pages: All have proper data-testid attributes for testing, clean rounded card designs, proper form validation

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 5 new pages load and function correctly)

seed_data_creation: Created test supplier, purchase order, goods receipt, and delivery note during testing - all cleaned up or marked as TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory Operations Pack fully tested and working. Backend endpoints for inventory operations dashboard, delivery notes, goods receiving, suppliers, purchase orders, and inventory ledger all return correct data. Frontend pages at /admin/inventory-operations, /admin/delivery-notes, /admin/goods-receiving, /admin/suppliers, /admin/procurement/purchase-orders all load correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Sidebar navigation includes all 5 new Inventory & Procurement items with moduleKey='inventory'. Stock movement tracking via inventory_movement_service.py and balance tracking via inventory_balance_service.py are operational.
